source.coordinate_system: PCB XY from existing L2 candidates; front-shell exterior is negative Z

print_process_assumption.recommended_orientation: outer labelled face on bed; stem/hub upward; verify first-layer label quality

knob.press_interface: the entire A-marked encoder knob moves axially with the EC12 push switch

round.intent: friction-fit coupon for an assumed round shaft

d-shaft.intent: friction-fit coupon for an assumed D shaft; flat angle remains replaceable

knurled-adapter.intent: knob accepts a separately printable keyed insert; only the insert changes after shaft measurement

mandatory_measurements_before_freeze: EC12 shaft type: round, D-flat or knurled
shaft maximum/minimum diameter at several heights
D-flat depth and angular index, if present
knurl major/minor diameter and tooth count, if present
usable shaft length above bushing and bushing diameter/height
EC12 axial push travel and knob clearance at full press
B/Menu tactile-switch actuator diameter, height and travel
printer/material hole shrink and first-layer compensation
